links.title: JubaKitiashvili/expo-pretext
links.description: React Native / Expo / Web port of Pretext. Native TextKit/TextPaint measurement + ~0.0002ms JS layout. FlashList, streaming AI chat, pinch-to-zoom, Dynamic Type. 386 tests, MIT.

links.title: wieslawsoltes/PretextSharp
links.description: .NET / C# port of pretext for SkiaSharp UIs. Grapheme-aware wrapping, locale-aware segmentation, bidi, streaming line walking, DirectWrite/FreeType/CoreText backends.

links.title: schalkneethling/masonry-gridlanes-wc
links.description: Light-DOM custom element wrapping CSS Grid Lanes masonry with a JS fallback. Pretext helpers exported separately for headless text metrics on text-heavy cards.

links.title: khj68/pretext-example
links.description: 23 interactive canvas-based art pieces — dragon, black hole, Pac-Man, fire, rain, magnet, vine, glitch, lightning, and more. Most use pretext for GPU-side text measurement.

links.title: darkroomengineering/fitbox
links.description: Reflow-free text-to-box fitting for React, built on @chenglou/pretext. useFit hook, <FitText> component, static CSS clamp() generator, SSR support.

links.title: Pretext.js Bypasses DOM Layout Reflow, Enabling Advanced UX Patterns at 120 FPS
links.description: Bruno Couriol on InfoQ — analysis of pretext's prepare/layout split and how it enables masonry, infinite lists, and scroll anchoring at 60-120 fps. Published April 20, 2026.

links.title: bibin765/tangentflow
links.description: Browser PDF document builder powered by pretext for pixel-perfect text wrapping. 13 block types, CJK/Arabic/emoji support, no headless browser.

links.title: BALOTIAS/vite-pretext
links.description: Zero-config Vite plugin that eliminates text-based CLS by delegating measurement to a Web Worker via @chenglou/pretext.

links.title: somnai-dreams/preimage
links.description: Image counterpart to pretext — measure and lay out images without DOM reflow. Mirrors pretext's prepare/layout split for the image side.

links.title: nikilok/virtual-text-layout
links.description: React hook that replaces measureElement with canvas-based text measurement for @tanstack/react-virtual. ~43% style recalc reduction during scroll.

links.title: MushyTaro/pretext-showcase
links.description: Interactive demo of @chenglou/pretext — text layout without DOM reflow. Supports all languages, emoji, and bidi text.

links.title: Discovering pretext in a fun way
links.description: Yaroslav Solovev on dev.to — interactive demo featuring an animated 3D goose tracking the cursor through a paragraph. Pretext + Three.js + Blender.

links.title: Position text over videos in real-time
links.description: Zalmay Karimi's demo: upload an MP4, pause on a frame, and place text into dark silhouette areas of the video using @chenglou/pretext. The Matrix is the headline example.
